title: Application of Hessian Matrix in Optimization
description: A flowchart illustrating how the Hessian matrix is used to classify critical points and guide optimization algorithms.
relationships: Function's critical point is found where gradient is zero
Hessian matrix is calculated at the critical point
Eigenvalues of Hessian are computed to determine definiteness
Definiteness classifies the nature of the critical point
This classification informs the optimization algorithm's next step
